name: BANHALMI guided quote pricing logic
reverseChargeRule: For non-Austrian EU business clients with valid company details and EU VAT number, the quote estimate may use reverse charge / 0% VAT. Final tax handling is manually confirmed.
disclaimer: Automatic quote calculator provides orientation only. Final offer depends on purpose, location, usage, production complexity and scheduling.

itemListElement.name: Individual portrait — quick 30 minutes
itemListElement.description: For confident clients who know what they need; short focused portrait session.

itemListElement.name: Individual guided portrait — 60 or 120 minutes
itemListElement.description: For clients who want guidance, time and a calmer selection process.

itemListElement.name: Group portrait photography
itemListElement.description: Company portraits for 6–20 people per hour; instant retouching up to 6 people or later retouching with original files delivered immediately and final retouched images within 48 hours.

priceSpecification.description: Base fee + per-person fee + retouched image count; additional photographers and mobile studio available.

itemListElement.name: Brand and visual positioning
itemListElement.description: Brand photography and visual positioning from a fast one-location session to multi-hour, multi-location productions.

itemListElement.name: Fine art photography
itemListElement.description: Artistic portraits, special visual concepts, private fine art, lingerie and nude photography handled as respectful artistic commissions.

professionalNetwork.photographerNetwork: Nearly 50 photographers, retouchers and visual specialists can be coordinated for selected projects.
professionalNetwork.coordination: Project coordination depends on project requirements: Norbert Banhalmi, a dedicated BANHALMI team coordinator, or for selected AmCham-related international business projects, Speier Viko.
professionalNetwork.amChamBenefit: AmCham members can receive 50% more professionally retouched images than selected, at no additional cost.
